User Story: As a member, I want to log in to access the reserved resources.
Acceptance criteria: - The application offers a member login screen - After successful login, the member accesses the reserved content - An error message is displayed if the login fails

User Story: As a non-logged-in user, I want to view the public sections of the application to access the content that is authorized for me.
Acceptance criteria: - Public content is accessible without logging in. - Content reserved for members is not accessible without logging in. - Available content depends on the user profile.

User Story: As a logged-in user, I want to log out to secure my access.
Acceptance criteria: - A logout option is available in the application - After logging out, the user no longer has access to restricted content

User Story: As part of the FFIE team, I want the application to integrate with existing FFIE membership management systems to synchronize member information and manage restricted access.
Acceptance criteria: - The application communicates securely with existing FFIE membership management systems via API. - Member information required by the application is synchronized. - Access to restricted content is managed according to roles and permissions.

User Story: As a user, I want to see navigation tailored to my profile so that I can only access authorized sections.
Acceptance criteria: Navigation is differentiated according to user profiles: member, non-member company, general public - Each profile only has access to the sections authorized for them - Restricted sections are protected

User Story: As a user, I want to check the FFIE news to stay informed.
Acceptance criteria: - The feed displays articles, press releases, events, and editorial content. - Content is displayed chronologically. - Content can be organized by category.

User Story: As a user, I want to open a news item to view its full content.
Acceptance criteria: - Each news item has a detailed view - The detailed view can display text, images, and associated documents - Sharing may be offered

User Story: As part of the FFIE team, I want existing documents from the FFIE website to be synchronized with the application to populate the document library.
Acceptance criteria: - Existing documents from the FFIE website are synchronized with the application. - Documents are structured in the document library. - Access to documents respects user rights.

User Story: As a member, I want to view the documents in the application to access professional resources.
Acceptance criteria: - Accessible documents can be opened in the application. - Viewing documents respects user rights.

User Story: As a member, I want to download documents to keep locally.
Acceptance criteria: - Accessible documents can be downloaded - Downloaded documents can be opened locally

User Story: As a member, I want to filter and search documents to quickly find a resource.
Acceptance criteria: The document library allows filtering - The document library allows searching by category - The document library allows searching by title - The displayed results respect user rights

User Story: As a general public visitor, I want to discover the jobs in the electricity sector to learn more about it.
Acceptance criteria: - A section dedicated to discovering careers in the electrical industry is available. - The section features career profiles. - The section may also include educational content and presentation videos.

User Story: As a user, I want to watch videos in the application to view the multimedia content offered.
Acceptance criteria: - Video content can be played within the application - An integrated video player displays multimedia content

User Story: As a user, I want to access a partners section to view the platforms associated with the FFIE.
Acceptance criteria: One section presents Qualifelec, Consuel, OPPBTP and other partners - Each partner has a link to their platform

User Story: As a user, I want to receive notifications to be informed of new content or important information.
Acceptance criteria: The application can send push notifications (automatic or one-off) – these notifications concern new content or important information.

User Story: As a user, I want faster access to previously viewed content and the ability to view it in a limited way without logging in.
Acceptance criteria: - The content you view may be cached. - Caching allows for faster access to the relevant content. - Cached content can be accessed in a limited way without an internet connection.

User Story: As part of the FFIE team, I want communications to be encrypted to protect data and access.
Acceptance criteria: - Communications are encrypted - Data access is controlled according to roles and permissions

User Story: As a user, I want my personal data to be processed in accordance with the GDPR.
Acceptance criteria: - Personal data is managed in accordance with GDPR obligations

User Story: As an FFIE administrator, I want to access the back office to manage the application's content and users.
Acceptance criteria: - Access to the back office is via a secure connection - FFIE administrators can use the provided administrative functions

User Story: As an FFIE administrator, I want to manage the news to publish and maintain the information displayed in the application.
Acceptance criteria: - News items can be managed from the back office - Managed news items appear in the application

User Story: As an FFIE administrator, I want to manage the application's content to keep the editorial sections up to date.
Acceptance criteria: The application's content can be managed from the back office - The managed content feeds the relevant sections of the application.

User Story: As an FFIE administrator, I want to manage documents to keep the document library up to date.
Acceptance criteria: Documents can be managed from the back office. Managed documents are available in the document library. A counter has been added to track the number of times a document has been downloaded. Document access respects user rights.

User Story: As an FFIE administrator, I want to manage the videos to feed the multimedia content of the application.
Acceptance criteria: - Videos can be managed from the back office. - Managed videos are available in the relevant sections of the application.

User Story: As an FFIE administrator, I want to manage users to control access to the application.
Acceptance criteria: - Users can be managed from the back office. - User management respects defined roles and rights.

User Story: As an FFIE administrator, I want to manage notifications to communicate with users.
Acceptance criteria: - Notifications can be managed from the back office. - Notifications can be sent for new content or important information.

User Story: As a member, I want to access a tutorial area to consult educational content.
Acceptance criteria: The tutorials section includes video tutorials, practical guides, and technical guides. - Educational content is accessible to authorized users.

User Story: As a member, I want to search and filter tutorials to easily find relevant content.
Acceptance criteria: - Tutorials can be organized by category - A search engine facilitates access to content

User Story: As a member, I want access to business calculation tools to perform technical calculations in the application.
Acceptance criteria: - A module integrates industry-specific calculation tools - The calculators can cover the topics defined in the proposal: power, sizing, and standards

User Story: As a member, I want to use the first available calculators to obtain results from the information entered.
Acceptance criteria: The first calculators defined by the FFIE are available - Each calculator allows the user to enter the necessary information - Each calculator displays a result
